overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval rural village with thatched-roof huts, crossing stone and wooden bridges over a river, and approaching a windmill. The scene features bright daylight with scattered clouds and lush green vegetation.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the narrow village street between wooden huts and fences

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress walking in the opposite direction, passing Geralt

traditional wooden hut with straw thatched roof on the right side of the path
rustic wooden picket fence running along the left side
rustic wooden picket fence running along the right side
tall wooden watchtower structure visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a narrow medieval village street lined with traditional thatched-roof huts and wooden fences. A woman in a green dress passes by in the opposite direction. The path is dirt with sparse grass, and a wooden watchtower is visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside approach with geese and villagers

events.description: exiting narrow village street into open riverside area with view of the water

agents.ego_description: Geralt approaching the riverbank where villagers and geese are present, heading toward the stone bridge

notable_agents.action: white geese walking and grazing near the path edge
villager standing near the water's edge looking out at the river

entered.detail: stone arch bridge crossing the river ahead
calm river water becoming visible in the distance
wooden market stall with canvas roof on the right side
wooden cart parked near the riverbank

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as Geralt leaves the village street and approaches the riverside. A stone bridge spans the river ahead, while geese graze on the right and a villager stands by the water. The environment becomes more open with moderate vegetation.

events.description: stepping onto the stone bridge to cross the river

agents.ego_description: Geralt crossing the stone bridge over the river, moving from the village side to the opposite bank

entered.detail: stone parapet railing along the left side of the bridge
wooden railing along the right side of the bridge
stone wall barrier on the left side of the bridge approach
large wooden windmill with rotating blades visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: Geralt crosses the stone bridge over the river, with stone railings on either side. The windmill becomes visible in the distance across the river. The river flows beneath on the left as he reaches the midpoint of the bridge.

events.description: leaving the stone bridge and continuing along the riverbank path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the riverbank dirt path with the windmill growing larger ahead

entered.detail: conical haystacks stacked in a field on the right side
small wooden footbridge crossing a narrow inlet ahead
distant thatched-roof building on the left across the water

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the river, Geralt walks along the dirt path on the opposite bank. The windmill dominates the center view, growing larger as he approaches. Haystacks dot the field to the right, and a small wooden bridge appears ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bridge crossing and windmill approach

events.description: crossing the small wooden bridge over the river inlet
slight turn to the right as the path curves toward the windmill

agents.ego_description: Geralt crossing the wooden bridge and continuing toward the windmill on the elevated path

entered.detail: planked wooden bridge surface crossing the narrow water inlet

segments.scene_description: Geralt crosses the wooden footbridge over a narrow inlet, with the windmill now prominently visible ahead. The path curves slightly toward the windmill, leaving the main river behind. The wooden bridge gives way to a dirt path as the windmill looms closer.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that leads from the enclosed streets of a medieval village out into an open riverside landscape dominated by a distant windmill. It begins by following Geralt through a narrow dirt path lined with thatched-roof huts and wooden fences, passing a woman in a green dress as he heads toward a wooden watchtower. As the village street opens up, the camera moves toward the riverside where geese graze and a villager stands by the water, before transitioning onto a stone bridge with railings. The scene then expands across the river, revealing a windmill in the distance that grows larger as Geralt walks along the opposite bank past scattered haystacks. Finally, the path curves across a small wooden footbridge over a narrow inlet, bringing the looming structure of the windmill into prominent view.
